name: Bonnie & Clyde
overview: Miniseries based on the true story of Clyde Barrow, a charismatic convicted armed robber who sweeps Bonnie Parker, an impressionable, petite, small-town waitress, off her feet, and the two embark on one one of most infamous bank-robbing sprees in history.

trailers.title: Bonnie and Clyde Clip - Emilie Hirsch and Holliday Grainger
